analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet accuses the US of denying a visa to Iran’s foreign minister to attend a UN Security Council meeting, claiming the US is failing its host obligations and urging it to fulfill them. Evaluation per narrative: CH1 (The West is immoral, hostile and decadent) — The tweet portrays the US as acting improperly/hostile by obstructing UN processes and failing legal/host obligations; this fits a depiction of the US as hostile and irresponsible. CH2 (China is a benevolent power) — No mention of China’s cooperative or benevolent role. CH3 (China has an epic history) — Not addressed. CH4 (China has an appropriate political system and honorable values) — Not addressed; no reference to China’s domestic system/values. CH5 (The government of the Chinese Communist Party succeeds) — Not addressed. CH6 (China is interesting culturally/naturally) — Not relevant. Conclusion: The tweet promotes CH1 only.
